why_now: Why this iteration is being run now.
thesis: Short description of the strongest current thesis.
antithesis: Short description of the strongest competing view.
synthesis_candidate: Short description of the proposed synthesis experiment.

active_tensions.label: Depth vs throughput
active_tensions.why_active: Both deeper and shallower variants have shown partial wins.

antithesis.summary: Favor higher throughput with a simpler stack.

transcendent.emergent_thought: Reduce depth slightly and reallocate saved compute elsewhere.
transcendent.concrete_change: Cut one layer and increase FFN width.

result.contradicted_assumption: Extra depth was assumed to dominate throughput costs.
result.framing_diagnosis: The comparison may be confounded by both depth and optimizer changes.
result.summary_text: The synthesis was promising conceptually but did not win in this exact framing.
